commands.help: Configure failure recovery actions for a service
commands.long_help: Configures the actions taken when a service fails using ChangeServiceConfig2 with SERVICE_CONFIG_FAILURE_ACTIONS. Can set reboot messages, run commands, and define recovery actions (restart, reboot, run command, none).

arguments.name: hostname
arguments.desc: Target machine. Empty string for local machine

arguments.name: service-name
arguments.desc: Name of the service to configure

arguments.name: reset-period
arguments.desc: Length of period with no failures before resetting the failure count (in seconds)

arguments.name: reboot-msg
arguments.desc: Broadcast message before reboot on failure. Empty string to omit

arguments.name: command
arguments.desc: Command to run on failure. Empty string to omit

arguments.name: num-actions
arguments.desc: Number of failure actions to configure

arguments.name: actions
arguments.desc: Comma-separated action/delay pairs (e.g., restart/5000,reboot/30000). Actions: none, restart, reboot, run
